final:
module gaussian_filter (
    input [7:0] P1, P2, P3,
    input [7:0] P4, P5, P6,
    input [7:0] P7, P8, P9,
    output reg [7:0] filtered_pixel
);
    always @(*) begin
        filtered_pixel = (P1 + 2*P2 + P3 +
                          2*P4 + 4*P5 + 2*P6 +
                          P7 + 2*P8 + P9) / 16;
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      filtered_pixel <= P1;
    end
  end

endmodule
